info.description:
OpenAPI schema for HyperFleet API generated from Go types with markers

Fields marked with +k8s:openapi-gen=false are excluded from this schema.
info.title: HyperFleet API

Cluster.description:
Cluster represents a HyperFleet managed OpenShift cluster
+kubebuilder:object:root=true
+kubebuilder:subresource:status
+kubebuilder:resource:scope=Namespaced

ClusterList.description:
ClusterList contains a list of Clusters
+kubebuilder:object:root=true

name.description:
Name is the name of the Cluster resource
+kubebuilder:validation:Required

namespace.description:
Namespace is the namespace of the Cluster resource
If empty, defaults to the same namespace as this NodePool

ClusterSpec.description: ClusterSpec defines the desired state of a Cluster

deleteProtection.description:
DeleteProtection prevents accidental deletion when enabled
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

displayName.description:
DisplayName is a human-readable name for the cluster
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable
+kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength=256

expirationTimestamp.description:
ExpirationTimestamp marks when this cluster should be automatically deleted
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

hostedCluster.description:
HostedCluster contains the full HyperShift HostedCluster configuration
All fields are generated from upstream and have safe defaults (hidden + service-set)
until explicitly reviewed and exposed
+kubebuilder:validation:Required

properties.description:
Properties are arbitrary key-value pairs for customer metadata
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

ClusterStatus.description: ClusterStatus defines the observed state of a Cluster

apiEndpoint.description: APIEndpoint is the cluster API server endpoint

consoleUrl.description: ConsoleURL is the web console URL

readyTime.description: ReadyTime is when the cluster became ready

state.description:
State represents the high-level cluster state
+kubebuilder:validation:Enum=pending;provisioning;ready;degraded;deleting;failed

version.description: Version is the observed OpenShift version

HostedClusterSpecPassthrough.description: HostedClusterSpecPassthrough mirrors HostedClusterSpec from upstream HyperShift

etcd.description:
etcd specifies configuration for the control plane etcd cluster. The
+k8s:openapi-gen=true
+hyperfleet:write-mode=service-set

platform.description:
platform specifies the underlying infrastructure provider for the cluster
+k8s:openapi-gen=true
+hyperfleet:write-mode=service-set

NodePool.description:
NodePool represents a HyperFleet managed NodePool for a cluster
+kubebuilder:object:root=true
+kubebuilder:subresource:status
+kubebuilder:resource:scope=Namespaced

NodePoolList.description:
NodePoolList contains a list of NodePools
+kubebuilder:object:root=true

NodePoolSpec.description: NodePoolSpec defines the desired state of a NodePool

autoRepair.description:
AutoRepair enables automatic repair of unhealthy nodes
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

displayName.description:
DisplayName is a human-readable name for the node pool
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

labels.description:
Labels to apply to nodes in this pool
+hyperfleet:write-mode=mutable

nodePool.description:
NodePool contains the full HyperShift NodePool configuration
All fields are generated from upstream and have safe defaults (hidden + service-set)
+kubebuilder:validation:Required

NodePoolSpecPassthrough.description: NodePoolSpecPassthrough mirrors NodePoolSpec from upstream HyperShift

NodePoolStatus.description: NodePoolStatus defines the observed state of a NodePool

availableReplicas.description: AvailableReplicas is the number of available nodes

conditions.description: Conditions represent detailed node pool status

readyReplicas.description: ReadyReplicas is the number of ready nodes

replicas.description: Replicas is the current number of nodes

state.description:
State represents the high-level node pool state
+kubebuilder:validation:Enum=pending;scaling;ready;degraded;deleting;failed
